title: More Outlines
description: A client side mod that adds more item/entity/block outlines, using the internal glowing effect.
body:
## More Outlines

A comprehensive Fabric mod for 1.21.8 that implements outline rendering for various objects including items, entities, block entities, and blocks.

## Screenshots

![Demo of glowing entities](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/62a07212226ed3596315f12cdc31e83361293a5e_0.webp)
![GUI](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e387fbffdbe427704f1239c03ee887074d4643b1_0.webp)

## Server Permission

The mod now has server permissions to allow/disallow it's use.
